overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, palm trees, and futuristic architecture. The journey progresses from open streets to sidewalks, crossing intersections, walking through covered walkways, and finally entering a neon-lit bar. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity graphics and atmospheric rain effects.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking down the center of the road. Palm trees line the median while neon-lit buildings tower on both sides, their reflections shimmering on the wet asphalt. Heavy rain falls continuously, creating a moody, atmospheric environment with no visible pedestrians or traffic.

segments.scene_description: Moving from the street onto the sidewalk, the scene features a neon-lit storefront with bright yellow trim on the right. An NCPD police car is parked at the curb while pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction. Palm trees line the sidewalk and heavy rain continues to fall, reflecting off the concrete surface.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at a yellow crosswalk, joining a moderate crowd of pedestrians. After crossing, the scene opens to reveal a massive modern concrete building on the right with towering digital billboards above. Vehicles pass by on the wet street as the rain continues to fall heavily.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway that provides shelter from the rain, the scene features metal railings on the left and a food truck on the right. The walkway is lined with benches and leads toward the 'Shea Shea' bar with its distinctive pink neon signage glowing in the distance. The ground is tiled and reflects the ambient neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions indoors into the Shea Shea bar, leaving the rain behind. The interior is bathed in vibrant purple and pink neon light, with a long bar counter on the right and potted plants near the entrance. The space is currently empty of patrons, creating an intimate atmosphere with reflective surfaces and futuristic decor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the center of a desolate, rain-slicked boulevard toward a bustling urban intersection dominated by massive architecture. It begins by gliding down the middle of a wide street lined with palm trees, where neon reflections shimmer on the wet asphalt under a heavy downpour. As the camera moves from the road onto the sidewalk, the environment shifts to a more crowded space featuring a bright yellow storefront and a parked NCPD police car. The scene then transitions across a yellow crosswalk amidst a flow of pedestrians, moving past passing vehicles toward the opposite side of the street. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a towering modern concrete building flanked by massive digital billboards that loom over the rain-soaked city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked outdoor walkway into the vibrant, sheltered interior of a futuristic bar. It begins by entering a covered passage where metal railings and a food truck line the path, with the tiled ground reflecting the distant pink glow of the Shea Shea signage. As the camera advances past benches and under the shelter of the walkway, the ambient city light intensifies, drawing the viewer closer to the entrance. The scene then shifts seamlessly indoors, leaving the rain behind to reveal a space bathed in deep purple and pink neon hues. Finally, the view opens up to an intimate, empty lounge featuring a long bar counter and potted plants, where reflective surfaces amplify the saturated cyberpunk lighting.
